Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Establishing Admissions
Off Calendar Jul-10-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Brandon Tang, Esq (510-896-9411) specially appearing for Midland Funding LLC, Plaintiff and moving party
James Kleier (415-200-7839) Defendant and opposing party in Pro Per.

Both parties stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC's Motion For Order Establishing Admissions is off calendar per Court's own motion. Responses have been served to Plaintiff prior to today's hearing. Motion for sanctions denied without prejudice. Judge Pro Tem to prepare an Order. Judge Pro Tem: Dennis Hyde, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
